questions.question_text: Describe the factors that should be taken into account in deciding the location of plant?
Define the plant layout and explain the significance of plant location. How will you decide the location of a mini steel plant in India?

Explain simple exponential smoothing method of forecasting demand. The demand for a two-wheeler was 900 units and 1030 units in April 2015 and May 2015, respectively. The forecast for the month of April 2015 was 850 units. Considering a smoothing constant of 0.6, considering a smoothing constant of 0.6, find the forecast for the month of June, 2015.
Explain the need for sales forecasting. How are forecasting methods classified?

Explain in detail the different types of Inventory Control Techniques. A machine tool manufacturing industry requires to purchase 2000 helical gears/year from a gear manufacturing industry. The ordering cost is Rs. 100/- per order and the carrying cost per unit per year is Rs. 10/-. The economic order quantity is 2

Write short notes on: Characteristics and objectives of Production Management. Difference between CPM and PERT.

A project consists of 7 jobs. Jobs A and F can be started and completed independently. Jobs B and C can start only after job A has been completed. Jobs D, E and G can start only after jobs B, and are completed, respectively. Time estimates of all the jobs are given in the following table: Job Time Estimates Optimistic Pessimistic Most Likely A B C D E F G 3 7 4 4 4 5 2 7 11 18 12 8 19 6 5 9 14 8 6 12 4 Draw the network and determine the critical path, and its expected duration . What is the probability of completing the project in days? Also, determine the total and free slacks of all the jobs.   e T e T
